assessor_raw: Card fraud detection experiment: methodologically sound. Temporal split, chargeback-confirmed labels, and precision at fixed recall are all appropriate for fraud detection. Both models receive equivalent tuning and class-weight balancing. Ablation suite (embedding ablation, augmented baseline, SHAP values) is comprehensive. Stratified performance by fraud amount, temporal stratification, and in/out-of-distribution account cohorts are excellent secondary analyses. Scope appropriately bounded. Verdict: defense_wins.
